title: Fall 2025 Kickoff Mixer
description: Our first meeting of the year! Networking with new members and overview of the upcoming semester.
longDescription: The Fall 2025 Kickoff Mixer was a huge success, bringing together over 100 aspiring legal professionals. We introduced the executive board, outlined our goals for the year, and enjoyed a night of networking and refreshments.

title: LSAT Strategy Workshop
description: Intensive workshop on logical reasoning and reading comprehension strategies.
longDescription: Led by top-scoring alumni, this workshop dove deep into the most challenging sections of the LSAT. Students participated in timed drills and received personalized feedback on their approach.

title: Test Event
longDescription: Led by top-scoring alumni, this workshop dove deep into the most challenging sections of the LSAT. Students participated in timed drills and received personalized feedback on their approach.
